title: Memgraph Core Dump / Segmentation Fault on Windows WSL
content: Memgraph container (RocksDB engine) crashes immediately with 'core dumped' or segmentation fault when using Windows physical directory bind mounts (e.g. ./memgraph_lib:/var/lib/memgraph) due to WSL I/O permission conflicts. FIX: MUST use Docker Named Volumes (e.g. memgraph_lib:/var/lib/memgraph) instead of bind mounts.
